text: Increased final cash offer of 71.4p per share expiring on 4 September 2026
Agreement in principle on a recommended cash offer of £6.90 per share, including a partial unlisted share alternative. PUSU deadline extended to 3 August 2026
The court hearing to sanction the Scheme to be held on 6 July 2026
All regulatory approvals received. Effective date scheduled for 4 August
